nasb.text: You say, ‘God stores away a man’s iniquity for his sons.’ Let God repay him so that he may know it.

esv.text: You say, ‘God stores up their iniquity for their children.’ Let him pay it out to them, that they may know it.

cnv.text: 你們說：‘　神為惡人的兒女積蓄罪孽’， 我卻說：‘　神報應他本人，好叫他自己明白。’

ccb.text: 你们说上帝会把惩罚留给他们的儿女， 我认为不如报应在他们本人身上， 让他们亲自领教。
